example.value: "Yayak lumom, pek kipanei ma-ma, tiba-tiba biles," Wak Sali kipasal ha Bah Meran nu jik, de biles ya Cekgu Ramlah medei mong sampah ku imije, tapi binakal ya sanget kilek de naipej sampah ku mije kek.
